sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74948" key="o)rqoka/qedros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-κάθεδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74948.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sitting upright,</tr_> cj. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:99" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.99</biblScope></bibl>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ευδον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
